subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1914-02-14
subcodes.first_line: The Blessed Beauty made mention of Khurasan, saying that this blessed Cause would be diffused throughout that land, wholly and entirely [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جمال مبارک ذکر خراسان را می‌فرمودند که این امر مبارک آنجا نشر خواهد یافت همه
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @growth of the Cause, @predictions and prophecies, @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar]
